title: Cryptography
summary: The protocol vocabulary for understanding how confidential execution protects data while still producing usable outputs.
description: The mathematical foundation. Explore Multi-Party Computation protocols and Zero-Knowledge proofs.

bodySections.title: What Lives Here
bodySections.body: Cryptography content translates the protocol layer into product consequences. It frames how Multi-Party Computation, verification, and encrypted coordination let Arcium expose useful application behavior without exposing the inputs that produced it.

bodySections.title: Why It Matters
bodySections.body: Without this layer, the rest of the atlas turns into branding. These articles make the privacy model concrete enough for readers to understand where confidentiality comes from and what kinds of tradeoffs builders are actually making.
